summary: Iter 42 — Share Tracking E2E (OG aliases piece/palette, POST /api/analytics/share tolerante a falha) + Wait-List público (/wait-list, POST /api/waitlist idempotente, GET /api/waitlist/count). All 18 test cases (T1–T18) PASSED. Backend pytest 12/12, Frontend Playwright 6/6.
critical_code_review_comments: waitlist.py: POST handler returns 500 when Mongo fails (correct — only the /analytics/share endpoint is silenced fire-and-forget, per spec).
analytics.py /analytics/share: empty body returns 422 — matches spec (Pydantic validation runs before handler try/except, so failure-before-handler is not silenced — intentional).
og.py aliases /piece and /palette are thin wrappers — they reuse marketplace/dna handlers and inherit caching and 404 OG-fallback behavior. Good DRY.
WaitList.jsx: select pre-selection from URL ?categoria=, fallback to 'aneis' on invalid, dynamic H1 — all working.
App.js: isPublic flag correctly suppresses Navbar on /wait-list and /dna/*.
test_credentials: Not required — both flows are public (no auth).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST waitlist entries with unique-uuid emails per test run; idempotency verified via duplicate POST. Plus 1 e2e submit via UI (e2e-iter42-<ts>@example.com, categoria=aneis).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_share_waitlist_iter42.py covers T1..T12 (3 share endpoint cases, 2 OG alias cases, 7 waitlist cases). Frontend critical selectors: data-testid='waitlist-page'|'waitlist-categoria-select'|'waitlist-email-input'|'waitlist-nome-input'|'waitlist-submit-btn'|'waitlist-success'|'waitlist-another-btn'. /wait-list is intentionally Navbar-less (isPublic in App.js). /api/analytics/share is fire-and-forget — empty body returns 422 (pre-handler validation), valid bodies always {ok:true}.

verified_evidence.T13_default_categoria: select=aneis, H1='Anéis de resina chegando em breve.'
verified_evidence.T14_luminarias: select=luminarias, H1='Luminárias de resina chegando em breve.'
